since_last: 12% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.15%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 12% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -2.10% · Gold -2.23% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 12% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.15%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.15%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.83%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.83%, DV +4.90%, BIDU +4.57%, PUBM +2.93%, EQIX +0.16%. Laggards: RXRX -5.21%, CEVA -4.54%, INTC -4.28%, NOW -4.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.04% at $149.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
